mapper.select: SELECT id, session_id, stage, action_type, title, description, priority, status, due_date, source, create_time, update_time FROM career_loop_action WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY CASE status WHEN 'todo' THEN 1 WHEN 'doing' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, id DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM career_loop_action WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND status IN ('todo', 'doing')
